query: Use /voice-mode for this. I’m walking to the station and cannot look at the screen; check the release note, then tell me whether staging is safe.
Switch to voice mode and keep it on for the rest of this call. Start by reading every item in the launch checklist back to me in order.
voice mode please — I’m driving. Inspect the incident summary and give me the decision, the owner, and the deadline without making me look at anything.
Enter voice-mode, run the verification program, and give me a short spoken result when it finishes. Put any paths or exact command output somewhere I can review later.
Turn voice mode on. I need to clean up an obsolete cache, so explain the consequence aloud and ask before you change anything.
Activate /voice-mode and summarize the deployment report for listening. Stay in that mode when I ask follow-up questions.
Go into voice mode now; I’m wearing headphones but away from my laptop. Tell me all six migration blockers with verbal numbering.
Start voice-mode for our live troubleshooting call. Check the logs normally, but speak only the useful conclusion and keep technical details in an artifact.
/voice-mode I can’t use the screen right now. Verify the handoff document and tell me in two sentences whether anything still blocks production.
I want voice mode on until I explicitly exit it. First, refresh the status and tell me what changed since the previous run.
Read this paragraph aloud in a warm, natural tone and give me an audio file I can add to the product tour.
Rewrite this update so it sounds conversational when I say it during tomorrow’s all-hands, but keep the response as normal formatted text.
Make the dashboard work well with VoiceOver and keyboard navigation; fix the missing labels in the settings panel.
Help me turn on macOS dictation and choose the right microphone for calls. I need device setup instructions.
Write a sixty-second voice-over script for the Cedar API launch video, with pauses marked for the narrator.
Exit voice mode and give me the ordinary Markdown summary with the changed paths and review link.
Summarize this customer-call transcript, list the objections, and draft a follow-up email for Mina.
Show me how to add text-to-speech to this React app using the browser speech synthesis API.
I’m on a live call with the incident team. Draft three questions I should ask the database owner and format them as a checklist I can see.
Keep normal response formatting. Inspect the release note and show me the exact paths, command output, and review URL in a table.
